examples:
!slashnext-host-reputation host=www.google.com
Context Example
{
"DBotScore": {
"Indicator": "www.google.com",
"Score": 1,
"Type": "domain",
"Vendor": "SlashNext Phishing Incident Response"
name: slashnext-host-reputation

outputs.description: The indicator that was tested DBotScore.Type Indicator type
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: Vendor used to calculate the score DBotScore.Score The actual score
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor

outputs.description: IP address IP.Malicious.Vendor For malicious IP addresses, the vendor that made the decision
outputs.name: IP.Address

outputs.description: For malicious IP addresses, the reason that the vendor made the decision SlashNext.IP.Value Value of the Indicator of Compromise (IoC)
outputs.name: IP.Malicious.Description

outputs.description: Type of the Indicator of Compromise (IoC) SlashNext.IP.Verdict SlashNext Phishing Incident Response verdict on the IoC
outputs.name: SlashNext.IP.Type

outputs.description: Threat status of the IoC SlashNext.IP.ThreatName Name of the threat posed by the IoC
outputs.name: SlashNext.IP.ThreatStatus

outputs.description: Type of the threat posed by the IoC SlashNext.IP.FirstSeen date
outputs.name: SlashNext.IP.ThreatType

outputs.description: SlashNext.IP.LastSeen date Time when the IoC was last observed
outputs.name: Time when the IoC was first observed

outputs.description: Domain name Domain.Malicious.Vendor For malicious domain names, the vendor that made the decision
outputs.name: Domain.Name

outputs.description: For malicious domain names, the reason that the vendor made the decision SlashNext.Domain.Value Value of the Indicator of Compromise (IoC)
outputs.name: Domain.Malicious.Description

outputs.description: Type of the Indicator of Compromise (IoC) SlashNext.Domain.Verdict SlashNext Phishing Incident Response verdict on the IoC
outputs.name: SlashNext.Domain.Type

outputs.description: Threat status of the IoC SlashNext.Domain.ThreatName Name of the threat posed by the IoC
outputs.name: SlashNext.Domain.ThreatStatus

outputs.description: Type of the threat posed by the IoC SlashNext.Domain.FirstSeen date
outputs.name: SlashNext.Domain.ThreatType

outputs.description: SlashNext.Domain.LastSeen date Time when the IoC was last observed
outputs.name: Time when the IoC was first observed
